texto: The great champions were always vicious competitors. You never lose respect for a man who is a vicious competitor, and you never hate a man you respect. I don't like Rod Laver because he's such a vicious competitor, but I don't dislike him.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pancho Gonzales: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The great champions were always vicious competitors. You never lose respect for a man who is a vi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, great, man pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de man e hate.
